item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: It?s called wage theft.
item.description: Woo that ended up longer than I?d planned. Recently I was told I have a terrible work ethic because I don?t believe that you need to turn up for work early to set up for your shift. My job requires me to log into my pc and start up and log into my tools and they expect me to do that before my shift starts. Nope. I don?t do that for fun or pleasure, therefore it is work, therefore, pay me for my time accordingly. Petty? Probably but this is how people get taken advantage of. (originally posted by @Chocolatecoveredmoose on 2021-06-12 21:07:42)

item.title: How to Adult {UPDATED}
item.description:
YES, this is a repost, but it was from around 2014. So, I updated all the links myself and added a few more entries. Let me know if you think some other things should be in here and I'll add them in! HOME What the hell is a mortgage? - http://www.realtor.com/advice/mortgage-basics-what-is-a-mortgage/ Apartment inspection checklist - https://www.apartments.com/blog/apartment-rental-checklist and https://i.imgur.com/8h6P91r.png Choosing an apartment and moving in - https://www.apartmentlist.com/renter-life/first-time-renter-apartment-guide-checklist First apartment essentials checklist - https://www.squawkfox.com/first-apartment-checklist/ The care and keeping of plants - https://www.plantandflowerinfo.com/ (scroll all the way up) MONEY How to save money - http://americasaves.org/for-savers/make-a-plan-how-to-save-money/54-ways-to-save-money How to do your own taxes - http://www.wikihow.com/Do-Your-Own-Taxes What to do when you can’t pay your bills - http://www.nolo.com/legal-encyclopedia/trouble-paying-bills-debts-tips-32215.html How to coupon - http://www.southernsavers.com/learn/ See if you’re paying too much for your cell phone bill - https://www.myrateplan.com/ HEALTH How to take care of yourself when you’re sick - http://www.sparkpeople.com/resource/nutrition_articles.asp?id=736 (this link is pre-COVID but it still has great general information for home sick care) Be prepared for a doctor’s appointment - https://www.oakstreethealth.com/18-tips-on-preparing-for-a-doctors-visit-521014 How to get free or discounted therapy - http://psychcentral.com/blog/archives/2012/12/04/what-to-do-when-you-cant-afford-therapy/ What to expect from your first gynecologist appointment - https://www.ubykotex.com/en-us/periods/period-prep/your-first-appointment-with-the-gynecologist How to make a doctors appointment - http://www.pamf.org/youngadults/health/manage/makingappointments.html How to pick a health insurance plan - https://www.nerdwallet.com/article/health/choose-health-insurance A list of stress relievers - http://www.mayoclinic.org/healthy-lifestyle/stress-management/in-depth/stress-relievers/art-20047257?reDate=23062015 How to prevent hangovers - http://cocktails.about.com/od/healthsafety/a/hngovr_101a_3.htm How to remove a splinter - http://thesecretyumiverse.wonderhowto.com/how-to/9-diy-ways-painlessly-remove-splinters-from-your-skin-0139135/ EMERGENCY What to do if you're stopped by police - https://www.aclu.org/know-your-rights/stopped-by-police A list of crisis hotlines - https://www.apa.org/topics/crisis-hotlines Disaster distress helplines - https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/disaster-distress-helpline How to drive safely in the winter - http://www.thesimpledollar.com/fifteen-things-to-have-in-your-car-this-winter/ How to do the Heimlich maneuver - http://www.nlm.nih.gov/medlineplus/ency/article/000047.htm JOB Time management - https://toggl.com/track/time-management-tips/ Create a resume - https://owl.purdue.edu/owl/job_search_writing/resumes_and_vitas/introduction.html Find the right career - http://www.helpguide.org/articles/work-career/finding-the-right-career.htm How to choose a college major - http://lifehacker.com/how-to-choose-a-college-major-when-youre-stuck-1678175742 How to interview for a job - http://www.quintcareers.com/job_interview_tips.html and https://imgur.com/gallery/aLVvEQe How to stop procrastinating - https://www.lifehack.org/articles/featured/11-practical-ways-to-stop-procrastination.html How to write cover letters - https://owl.purdue.edu/owl/job_search_writing/skilled_labor_job_search_resources/cover_letters/index.html TRAVEL Ultimate packing list - https://www.smartertravel.com/the-ultimate-packing-list/ Traveling for cheap - http://travelpaintrepeat.com/post/59743516609/how-i-afford-travel The best way to pack a suitcase - http://www.realsimple.com/work-life/travel/best-way-pack-suitcase How to read a map - http://www.wikihow.com/Read-a-Map How to make a travel budget - https://www.wildjunket.com/how-to-plan-your-travel-budget/ BETTER YOU Read the news - https://www.smartnews.com and https://i.imgur.com/EAVb90V.jpeg Leave your childhood traumas behind - http://www.helpguide.org/articles/ptsd-trauma/emotional-and-psychological-trauma.htm How to quit smoking - http://www.helpguide.org/articles/addiction/how-to-quit-smoking.htm How to stop biting your nails - http://www.webmd.com/beauty/nails/stop-nail-biting-tips How to stop micromanaging - https://www.managementcenter.org/article/staying-involved-without-micromanaging/ How to ask for help - http://teenshealth.org/teen/your_mind/problems/help_obstacles.html How to stop being a pushover - https://www.inc.com/lolly-daskal/7-powerful-habits-that-make-you-more-assertive.html Learn another language - https://www.duolingo.com/ How to improve your self-esteem - http://au.reachout.com/steps-to-improve-self-esteem Other educational websites - https://i.imgur.com/89knPXD.jpeg General self improvement habits - https://i.imgur.com/AaGDhJO.jpeg
This is actually a sales tactic used to create rapport with customers. So, unless you can do this naturally somehow (not 3 times in 5 minutes), this would be a definite turn off if I just met you in a social situation. Just, take this one with a grain of salt. Don't be too aggressive about it.

item.title: *Budding* comic artist (Part 26)
item.description:
It's magic I swear!
Always ask permission before propagating someone's plants!
Scratch being part red-panda, I'm part pigeon apparently!
And you can bet that I didn't learn my lesson!
Some days I just want to be turned into a roast
Speaking of which, cat tax time!!
Here he is, Mr.Chonk awaits his tummy rubs! If you would like to see more of my comics you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/amyrevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Yay masks.
item.description: Avoiding: Indoor restaurants, larger social gatherings Calculated risk: Small indoor gatherings with a few friends Doing normally/no mask: All outdoor acitivities. My wife does the same, so we have our mini anti virus bubble. State governor has recommended mask use for indoors, so I will not look like a weirdo for some more time.
